goal:
给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有
  markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到
  E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Build Python Flask backend with all REST APIs: file listing, directory tree, tag aggregation, markdown rendering, backlink detection, full-text search, and document save/update

children.description: Create Flask app skeleton with health check, error handlers, and CORS setup
Build KBIndex class that scans markdown files, parses YAML frontmatter, and extracts titles/tags
Add GET /api/tree endpoint returning nested directory tree from indexed docs
Add backlink detection: extract [[wiki]] and [md](links), resolve to known paths, build backlink graph
Add GET /api/doc?path=X endpoint returning rendered HTML, metadata, tags, backlinks, and outgoing links
Add GET /api/tags endpoint returning all tags with document counts
Add GET /api/search?q=X endpoint with full-text search across titles and bodies
Add PUT /api/doc endpoint to save markdown content to disk with path traversal protection

tree.description: Build single-page frontend with sidebar directory tree, tag cloud navigation, markdown document viewer with clickable bidirectional links, full-text search bar, and inline document editor
Create a one-command launch script that installs dependencies and starts the server, plus a README with usage instructions
